data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the final completion certificate.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the existence and functionality related to the final completion certificate. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate actual implementation or validation of the requirement for the final completion certificate.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for issuing a final completion certificate.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the issuance of the final completion certificate.
